quick_skim.title: CMTFormer: Marrying Transformer with Hierarchical Information Interaction for RGB-Event Object Detection
quick_skim.abstract: Event cameras capture sparse brightness changes with high temporal resolution and high dynamic range, compensating for the deficiencies of the conventional RGB frames. However, previous multi-modal fusion techniques typically fail to handle the inherent heterogeneity between RGB frames and event streams, thus easily leading to noise amplification or redundant feature integration during cross-modal fusion. In this paper, we propose a Cross-Modal information inTeraction transFormer, coined as CMTFormer, which hierarchically integrates RGB and event information to achieve efficient and stable multimodal collaboration. Specifically, we design a shallow-to-deep information interaction scheme. In the shallow stage, we present the Shallow Alignment Module (SAM) to achieve an efficient fusion of RGB and event low-level features, which mitigates attribute disparities and prevents noisy information. In the middle stage, we devise the Cross-modal Enhancement Module (CEM) that utilizes texture and edge information to produce mutually reinforced middle-level features. In the deep stage, we present the Learnable Deep Fusion Module (LDFM) which performs high-level information aggregation through learnable weights, thus enabling the network to adaptively fuse RGB and event clues. A Spatial Prior Module is further designed to utilize global spatial information to enhance localization accuracy. Extensive experiments are conducted on two prevalent event-based object detection benchmarks, i.e., DSEC-Detection and PKU-DAVIS-SOD. Our CMTFormer consistently surpasses the detection counterparts in both uni-modal and multi-modal settings, strongly demonstrating the effectiveness of our paradigm. Codes will be available upon publication.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: cross-modal fusion of RGB and event streams for object detection
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: RGB与事件流的跨模态融合用于目标检测
quick_skim.llm_evidence: RGB与事件流的跨模态融合用于目标检测
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: RGB与事件流的跨模态融合用于目标检测
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: CMTFormer addresses RGB-event fusion heterogeneity via a shallow-to-deep hierarchical interaction transformer, enabling efficient multimodal collaboration for object detection.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对RGB帧与事件流融合中的模态异构性问题，提出CMTFormer，采用浅层到深层的层次化信息交互方案。该方法通过跨模态信息交互变换器有效整合RGB和事件特征，避免了噪声放大和冗余融合。在目标检测任务上验证了其高效稳定的多模态协作能力，为事件相机与RGB融合提供了新的技术路径。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对RGB帧与事件流融合中的模态异构性问题，提出CMTFormer，采用浅层到深层的层次化信息交互方案。该方法通过跨模态信息交互变换器有效整合RGB和事件特征，避免了噪声放大和冗余融合。在目标检测任务上验证了其高效稳定的多模态协作能力，为事件相机与RGB融合提供了新的技术路径。
